name: Orange-Cranberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim a thin slice from both ends of the oranges.
2. Cut each orange in half lengthwise.
3. Using a shallow "v" shaped cut, remove the white center core from each half.
4. Cut the orange halves into chunks and blend until smooth in a covered electric blender.
5. Add the cranberries to the blender and continue blending until smooth, or pulse through a food grinder.
6. Stir in the brown sugar and chopped walnuts.
7. Chill before serving.
